title: Ontology Dependencies (Full DAG)
name: Ontology Dependencies (Full DAG)
description: Every live `owl:imports` edge across the registry plus every endpoint ontology. Powers the full dependency overview.
content:
FOR e IN imports
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET src = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET dst = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  RETURN {
    from_key: src._key,
    from_name: src.name,
    to_key: dst._key,
    to_name: dst.name,
    edge_key: e._key,
    import_iri: e.import_iri,
    created: e.created
  }
value:
FOR e IN imports
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET src = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET dst = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  RETURN {
    from_key: src._key,
    from_name: src.name,
    to_key: dst._key,
    to_name: dst.name,
    edge_key: e._key,
    import_iri: e.import_iri,
    created: e.created
  }

title: Upstream Ontologies (Ancestors)
name: Upstream Ontologies (Ancestors)
description: What does this ontology depend on? Transitive OUTBOUND traversal of `imports` from the given root, up to 10 hops.
content:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..10 OUTBOUND CONCAT('ontology_registry/', @ontology_id) GRAPH 'ontology_imports'
  OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'global', bfs: true }
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  RETURN {
    _key: v._key,
    name: v.name,
    tier: v.tier,
    status: v.status,
    depth: LENGTH(p.edges),
    via_iri: e.import_iri
  }
value:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..10 OUTBOUND CONCAT('ontology_registry/', @ontology_id) GRAPH 'ontology_imports'
  OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'global', bfs: true }
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  RETURN {
    _key: v._key,
    name: v.name,
    tier: v.tier,
    status: v.status,
    depth: LENGTH(p.edges),
    via_iri: e.import_iri
  }

title: Downstream Dependents
name: Downstream Dependents
description: Who depends on this ontology? Transitive INBOUND traversal of `imports` from the given root, up to 10 hops. Critical for impact analysis before deprecation.
content:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..10 INBOUND CONCAT('ontology_registry/', @ontology_id) GRAPH 'ontology_imports'
  OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'global', bfs: true }
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  SORT LENGTH(p.edges) ASC, v.name ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: v._key,
    name: v.name,
    tier: v.tier,
    status: v.status,
    depth: LENGTH(p.edges)
  }
value:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..10 INBOUND CONCAT('ontology_registry/', @ontology_id) GRAPH 'ontology_imports'
  OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'global', bfs: true }
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  SORT LENGTH(p.edges) ASC, v.name ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: v._key,
    name: v.name,
    tier: v.tier,
    status: v.status,
    depth: LENGTH(p.edges)
  }
